title: Book Formatting
description: Adds Formatting buttons to the Book GUI and lets you type a section sign using left Alt
body:
A simple fabric mod that adds buttons to the book GUI to insert the normally untypeable [formatting codes](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Formatting_codes) into the text. Also lets you type a section sign (```§```) using left alt.

NOTE: Due to a bug in vanilla the reset code (```§r```) does not reset formatting from the previous line until the next line. To avoid this you can reset the formatting after each line or use a color code instead which also resets all other formatting.
